other_observers: CFO trip including Larry Semo, Glenn Walbek, Joey Kellner, Bill Maynard, Nathan Pieplow, Mark Peterson, Todd Deininger, Dan Maynard, John Drummond.;
specific_location: Fox Ranch W. of Idalia along Arickaree River just west of CR U, approx. 39.760760 N, 102.467824 W.
description: A large & bulky sparrow dominated by by rufous tones & boldly marked underparts. The underparts have a white background marked by rows of heavy dark reddish-brown stripes along flanks & breast, thinning towards belly.The wings, tail, & back were dominated by rufous-red coloration, contrasting with a gray nape. The head had a rufous crown & gray supercillium. Gray was also around the eye and on the front part of the auricular, with a triangular rufous facial frame formed by an eye-line and the rear & lower auricular. A white malar contrasted with a rufous lateral throat-stripe, which in turn contrasted with a whitish throat. The bill was bright yellow.Behaviors: The bird flew into a willow tree and skulked before flying off.Call: I didn't note any vocalization.Plumage: Red Fox Sparrow
